items.author: John Hollinger
items.body_excerpt: Yaxel Lendeborg's absolute favorite thing to do is sprint in transition into a quick post up against a guard. Just did it to Javon Small to create an open shot for a teammate, even though they didn't get a bucket out of it; Yax is big enough and fast enough that this ploy should translate.

items.title: Hello Bluesky!
items.author: Morten Stig Jensen
items.body_excerpt:
Hello Bluesky!

I'm looking for a(nother) place to write this season.

If you're looking for NBA analysis, and someone who will crack bad jokes at editorial meetings, I'm absolutely your guy.

I'm Danish, but I'm in recovery. So my English proficiency should be at a decent level.

Here's my work:

media.title: Morten Stig Jensen - Yahoo Sports
media.description: Morten has covered the NBA since 2008 in national and international media. He takes particular interest in team construction analysis and is privately very, very Danish.

items.title: Greetings again from Las Vegas, where despite the best efforts of my degenerate friends I have managed to make it to the arena at a reasonable hour. Conclusions of Rockets-Sixers leading us off today before the Kings-Nets main event (when else is that phrase used?) and Silver's p
items.author: John Hollinger
items.body_excerpt: Greetings again from Las Vegas, where despite the best efforts of my degenerate friends I have managed to make it to the arena at a reasonable hour. Conclusions of Rockets-Sixers leading us off today before the Kings-Nets main event (when else is that phrase used?) and Silver's press conference.
